center.name: 開普敦
center.summary: 開普敦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Southern black korhaan、Fynbos buttonquail、Cape siskin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in towns and the suburbs of Cape Town

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|In natural habitat The species is endemic to South Africa and is found along the south coast from Cape Town to Algoa Bay in Eastern Cape province where it occurs in mountain fynbos where vegetation is relatively sparse. A 1994 survey resulted in an estimate of c.310-420 birds in of montane fynbos habitat in Cape of Good Hope Nature Reserve

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern black korhaan (Afrotis afra), also known as the black bustard, is a species of bird in the bustard family, Otididae. This small bustard is found in southwestern South Africa, from Namaqualand, south to Cape Town and east to Makhanda. It prefers semi-arid habitats such as grasslands, shrublands and savannas where it can easily prey on ground-dwelling arthropods and eat seeds.{{Cite journal|last1=Kok|first1=O
